name: 山海皆可平
developer: 南京指尖互娱数字科技有限公司
publisher: 南京指尖互娱数字科技有限公司
short_description: The game is a single-player action-adventure game based on the Chinese mythical story.
detailed_description:
"Mountains and seas can be leveled" is a classic horizontal 3D shooting adventure game, taking the fairy mountains and exotic animals recorded in the book of mountains and seas as the world view of the game. You can fly with the sword in Kunlun Xianshan mountain, cross the Zhongshan forest guarded by the candle dragon, fight with Feng Boyu and experience the adventure in the myth.

Game features:

1. 3D horizontal shooting.

2. Mythical monster boss

3. Tiangong, undersea, forest, Xianshan and other special scenes.
